svg.title: README proof card for the option pricing library
svg.desc: Four readable proof tiles for README width covering surface repair, smooth Dupire handoff, local-vol and PDE validation, and benchmark plus delivery evidence. Metrics are loaded from the published proof pages and committed performance artifacts.
